title: Fantasya Precious Gems
body:
This mod adds precious gems that are found with a very low chance, allow you to create legendary tools. like the black diamond sword or the hammer!
Download this mod to add a little extra preciousness to your world!

This mod adds 12 precious gems that can be found with little probability from minecraft base minerals and 5 new ones. And 3 enchanted foods that restore life including steak, bread and fish.
VANILLA Gems
-Black Diamon (Found in the diamond)
-Pure Gold (Found in gold)
-Star Ruby (Found in the redstone)
-Moss Agate (Found in the emerald)
-Malachite (Found in Lapis Lazuli)
-Citrine (Found in Iron)
-Fierite (Found in quartz)

MODDED GEMS (base stones with: MysticalWorld and Ars Nouveau)
-Jada (Found in Silver)
-Tigerseye (Found in Copper)
-ShadowGem (Found in the Arcane / Source Gem)
-Blue Sapphire (Found in Sapphire)
-Zicron (Found in the Pearl [mineral integrated in the mod])
